# Summary

What does this PR change? One or two sentences.

## Motivation / context

Link the issue if there is one. Explain why this change is worth making.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change (touches `claude_sessions.api`)
- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] Refactor / internal

## Tests

What did you add or change? How did you verify?

## Checklist

- [ ] `make lint` passes
- [ ] `make test` passes
- [ ] Docs updated (README / CONTRIBUTING) if behavior changed
- [ ] No breaking change to `claude_sessions.api` without an `api-break` issue
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits
